Banking & Finance

Major Indonesian Bank Strengthens Security Posture

4 weeks initial, ongoing monitoring
Penetration TestingManaged SOCCompliance Audit

The Challenge

A major national bank faced increasing cyber threats and regulatory pressure to enhance their security infrastructure. They needed comprehensive penetration testing and ongoing security monitoring.

Our Solution

We conducted a thorough 4-week penetration test covering network infrastructure, web applications, and mobile banking platforms. Implemented managed SOC services for 24/7 monitoring.

"Cyber Ventures Indonesia transformed our security operations. Their thorough approach and ongoing support give us confidence in our ability to protect customer data."
Chief Information Security Officer
Major Indonesian Bank

Key Results

  • Identified and remediated 45 critical vulnerabilities
  • Zero successful breaches since implementation
  • Achieved full compliance with BI regulations
  • Reduced incident response time by 70%

Impact Metrics

45
Vulnerabilities Found
12
Critical Issues
100%
Remediation Rate
98%
Compliance Score
Government

Government Agency Incident Response & Recovery

72 hours emergency response
Incident ResponseDigital ForensicsSecurity Architecture

The Challenge

A government agency experienced a sophisticated ransomware attack that encrypted critical systems and threatened to expose sensitive citizen data.

Our Solution

Our incident response team was deployed within 2 hours. We contained the breach, eradicated the threat, restored systems from backups, and implemented enhanced security controls.

"Their rapid response saved us from a potential disaster. The team's expertise and professionalism during the crisis was exceptional."
Head of IT
Government Agency

Key Results

  • Contained breach within 4 hours of engagement
  • Zero data exfiltration confirmed
  • Full system recovery in 48 hours
  • Implemented zero-trust architecture

Impact Metrics

2hrs
Response Time
4hrs
Containment
48hrs
Recovery
0%
Data Lost
E-Commerce

E-Commerce Platform Security Overhaul

8 weeks implementation
Vulnerability AssessmentPCI DSS ComplianceSecurity Consulting

The Challenge

A rapidly growing e-commerce platform with 2M+ users needed to secure their infrastructure against increasing attacks while maintaining PCI DSS compliance.

Our Solution

Comprehensive security assessment followed by implementation of WAF, enhanced authentication, encryption protocols, and continuous vulnerability management.

"Their comprehensive approach addressed vulnerabilities we didn't even know existed. Our platform is now more secure than ever."
CTO
Leading E-Commerce Platform

Key Results

  • Blocked 99.9% of automated attacks
  • Maintained 100% PCI DSS compliance
  • Reduced fraud attempts by 85%
  • Zero data breaches over 18 months

Impact Metrics

1.2M
Attacks Blocked
85%
Fraud Reduction
99.99%
Uptime
+40%
